---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SmartTouch
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I often want to toggle flashlight but the only zone I can use is…")

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Other approaches you've thought about.

## Privacy Consideration
SmartTouch is committed to 100% offline, no-tracking operation. Please confirm this feature can be implemented without:
- [ ] Internet access
- [ ] Analytics / telemetry
- [ ] Data collection or transmission

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
